message:
feat: Enhance service layer with improved CLI integration

Refactor and improve gateway services:

- Improve br.service with better beads_rust CLI integration
- Enhance bv.service with streamlined viewer operations
- Refactor dcg-cli.service for cleaner command execution
- Add agent-health.service improvements
- Extend setup.service with additional configuration options
- Add ubs.service refinements
- Introduce cli-logging utility for consistent service output
- Expand links utility for better URL handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
